title: Driit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''driit''' was a monetary unit on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]] used around the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''
